SEARCH
Package org.apache.arrow.datafusion

Class DfScalarUDFAdapter

java.lang.Object
org.apache.arrow.datafusion.DfScalarUDFAdapter
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.apache.arrow.datafusion.generated.DfScalarUdfTrait
public final class DfScalarUDFAdapter extends Object implements org.apache.arrow.datafusion.generated.DfScalarUdfTrait
Adapts a user-implemented ScalarUDF to the Diplomat-generated DfScalarUdfTrait interface for FFI callbacks.
